verifications.title: Churn forecast tracking overview
verifications.content: We track forecasted churn monthly by summing up projected cancellations across active subscriptions and dividing by active subscriptions at the period's start.
verifications.user_quote: Yep, that's how we forecast churn: we track it monthly by summing up projected cancellations across active subscriptions and dividing by active subscriptions at the period's start.
